# Pull Request

## 🧩 Summary

What does this PR do? (Short description)

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have read the **Contributor Guidelines** in [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](https://github.com/vectorcmdr/NMSE/blob/main/.github/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My changes follow the project style and conventions
- [ ] I have not introduced external packages or libraries
- [ ] I have added localisation to UI strings
- [ ] I added/updated tests (if applicable)
- [ ] All existing and new tests pass
- [ ] I have updated documentation as needed

## 🧪 Testing

Describe how this was tested, and include steps to reproduce.

## 💬 Notes

Any additional context, notes, or concerns.

---

<details>
<summary>🚀 Recommended PR Flow</summary>

1. Create a feature branch from `main`.
2. Make small, focused commits.
3. Update or add tests for your changes.
4. Open PR and link related issues.

</details>
